days.title: Arrival in Rome
days.subtitle: Settling into the Eternal City

timeline.title: Check in to Hotel Roma Centrale
timeline.detail: Check into the hotel located just a short walk from Termini Station. Freshen up and prepare for your first exploration in Rome.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel Roma Centrale, Via Nazionale 1, Rome

timeline.title: Explore the Colosseum
timeline.detail: Visit the iconic Colosseum, one of the greatest works of Roman architecture and engineering. Pre-book your tickets online to skip the long lines.

timeline.title: Stroll through Roman Forum
timeline.detail: Walk through the historical heart of ancient Rome. Discover ruins of important government buildings and soak in the historical ambiance.

timeline.title: Dinner at Trattoria Da Enzo
timeline.detail: Indulge in classic Roman dishes at this well-loved trattoria in Trastevere. The carbonara and tiramisu are must-tries.

timeline.title: Evening Walk at Piazza Navona
timeline.detail: Enjoy a leisurely walk at the beautiful Piazza Navona, famous for its stunning fountains and lively atmosphere, perfect for a nightcap.

localTips: Purchase a Roma Pass for discounts on public transport and entry into several museums.
Be prepared for large crowds at major attractions; visiting early or late is advised.
Trastevere is charming at night; enjoy a casual walk after dining.

days.title: Historic Wonders of Rome
days.subtitle: Exploring Vatican City and beyond

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Enjoy a hearty Italian breakfast at your hotel, featuring pastries, coffee, and seasonal fruits to start your day.

timeline.title: Visit St. Peter's Basilica
timeline.detail: Witness the breathtaking architecture of St. Peter's Basilica. Climb to the dome for a spectacular view of the Vatican.

timeline.title: Lunch at Pizzeria La Montecarlo
timeline.detail: Taste authentic Roman pizza at this local favorite. Their thin crust and fresh toppings are a hit among locals.

timeline.title: Explore Vatican Museums
timeline.detail: Home to thousands of years of art, the Vatican Museums house masterpieces from Michelangelo, Raphael, and many more. Advance ticket purchase recommended.

timeline.title: Evening Walk at Castel Sant'Angelo
timeline.detail: Visit this historic fortress and enjoy strolling along the Tiber River, absorbing the lovely sunset views and atmosphere.

timeline.title: Dinner at Osteria da Fortunata
timeline.detail: Dine on fresh handmade pasta at this vibrant osteria. Try the cacio e pepe, a Roman specialty that locals adore.

localTips: Book Vatican Museums tickets in advance to avoid long lines.
Dress modestly for visits to religious sites; no shorts or sleeveless shirts.
Try gelato from local shops after dinner; it's a must in Rome!

days.title: Culinary Romp and Departure
days.subtitle: Last tastes of Rome

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Enjoy your final breakfast at the hotel before packing for departure. Don’t miss their homemade pastries!

timeline.title: Coffee at Caffè Sant'Eustachio
timeline.detail: Relish a cup of espresso at this iconic café, famed for its rich coffee and local ambiance. A perfect start to your day.

timeline.title: Explore Campo de' Fiori Market
timeline.detail: Visit this bustling market filled with fresh produce, local delicacies, and trinkets. A great opportunity for last-minute souvenirs.

timeline.title: Lunch at Forno Campo de' Fiori
timeline.detail: Try their famous pizza bianca or a sandwich from this traditional bakery, perfect for a casual yet delicious last lunch.

timeline.title: Check out and Depart for Airport
timeline.detail: Check out of the hotel and catch your transport to the airport, reflecting on the wonderful adventures of the past few days.

highlights: Final meal at Campo de' Fiori
localTips: Make sure to take all your souvenirs and important documents before leaving the hotel.
Keep some small change handy for market vendors and tips.
Always validate your train tickets before boarding to avoid fines.

urgent.label: Book Vatican Museums Tickets
urgent.note: Tickets must be reserved in advance online.

_warnings.message: Day 3: "Breakfast at Hotel" also appeared on Day 2 — same venue on consecutive days?
